headline: Meituan's 1.6 trillion parameter LongCat-2.0 open model anchors a week dominated by mixture-of-experts scaling and a closing open-source gap.
body: Meituan released LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with sparse attention activating roughly 48 billion parameters per token, trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than GPUs and uploaded to Hugging Face. The launch lands alongside commentary that the gap between open-source and frontier models is narrowing fast and that Chinese models are gaining adoption on cost and data sovereignty grounds. On the agent front, Anthropic is pushing direct Teams integration against Microsoft's broader agent strategy, and Claude is being embedded into Slack and Teams as a digital employee. Infrastructure threads also surfaced, including questions over why European AI buildout is not flowing toward Iceland's renewable energy and cooling.
